title: Mount <SeccionActualizacion /> in Configuracion.tsx and remove hardcoded version string
description: Render the new section in Configuracion and replace the hardcoded 'versión 0.1.0' string with the version surfaced by the hook (via SeccionActualizacion). Per '## Constraints / Keep package.json.version as single source of truth' — no string literal versions allowed.
acceptance_criteria: Component placement matches existing MUI Paper card layout / spacing
Page renders without runtime errors in dev (npm run dev)
completion_summary: Mounted <SeccionActualizacion /> between PIN and Carpeta de datos Papers; replaced hardcoded 0.1.0 footer with currentVersion from useAutoUpdater hook
